title: World of Flags
description: This is a decorative mod that adds national symbols of various countries to the game. With this mod, you can add more details to your city. The mod includes numerous items. The list of countries will be updated over time.
body:
## **WORLD OF FLAGS**

World of Flags is a decorative Minecraft mod that adds national flags and symbols from different countries to the game.

Use it to add more detail and identity to cities, buildings, embassies, public spaces, streets, roleplay maps, and other decorative builds.

The mod currently includes flags for several countries and organisations, including Germany, Austria, the Netherlands, the European Union, Ukraine, England, the United Kingdom, the United States, and Russia. More countries and national symbols will be added in future updates.

World of Flags is currently available for Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21.1, and 1.21.8. Main development has now moved to Minecraft 1.21.1.


Supported languages:
English, Russian, Spanish (Mexico), German, and Ukrainian.

## **CONTENT**

The mod adds a wall-mounted flag holder to the game. It can be attached to walls, and by **right-clicking** it with a flag, the flag will be placed in the upper position. To place the flag in the lower position, **left-click** the flag holder instead. For this feature to work, you need to be in **Survival** mode.

![Flag Holder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa200de189ba63f3320d2574ee8323c84ed5e8fb_0.webp)

For every country will be added special item or block. For every country this item will be different. On photo example of special item for Russia.

![Coat of Arms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aa6cfe01d6c6bfc51fb729f27613ed96de105aa.png)
